drug_name: SUNMARK TRIPLE ANTIBIOTIC PLUS PAIN RELIEF
generic_name: POLYMYXIN B SULFATE, BACITRACIN ZINC, NEOMYCIN SULFATE, AND PRAMOXINE HYDROCHLORIDE
active_ingredients: Active ingredients (in each gram) Purposes Bacitracin 500 units First aid antibiotic Neomycin 3.5 mg First aid antibiotic Polymyxin B 10,000 units First aid antibiotic Pramoxine HCl 10 mg Topical pain reliever
indications_and_usage: Uses first aid to help prevent infection and for temporary relief of pain or discomfort in minor: cuts scrapes burns
dosage_and_administration: Directions unscrew cap and pull tab to remove foil seal adults and children 2 years of age and older: clean the affected area apply a small amount of this product (an amount equal to the surface area of the tip of a finger) on the area 1 to 3 times daily may be covered with a sterile bandage children under 2 years of age: ask a doctor
